snippet.title: Debt markets are gradually coming back, says JLL CEO Christian Ulbrich
snippet.description:
JLL CEO Christian Ulbrich joins 'Squawk on the Street' to discuss the commercial real estate sector slowdown, real estate market dynamics since Covid, and transitioning office buildings for different uses. For access to live and exclusive video from CNBC subscribe to CNBC PRO: https://cnb.cx/2NGeIvi
